title: The Cheese Realm
description: A mod with cheese, cheese, and more cheese!
body:
### Want cheese? You got it!
## This mod adds:
- A cheese dimension
- The cheesemaker villager profession (which uses the Cheese Table)
- Various cheese food items
- Moon Cheese
#### And more!
Made using MCreator Mod Maker: [MCreator.net](https://mcreator.net/)
